name: Olde City Jewelry & Pawn
description_short: Family-operated pawn shop in St. Augustine, FL offering collateral-based loans, jewelry sales, and precious metal transactions with 35+ years of industry experience.
description_long:
Olde City Jewelry & Pawn is a family-operated pawn shop located in St. Augustine, Florida, that has served the local community since 2008. The business leverages over 35 years of combined industry experience and operates from a spacious 5,000-square-foot showroom. They serve St. Augustine and surrounding areas including Bunnell, Elkton, Hastings, Nocatee, and Palm Coast.

The company offers a comprehensive range of pawn shop services including collateral-based loans, buy/sell/trade transactions for jewelry and collectibles, and cash advances against personal items. Their inventory focuses on fine jewelry, natural diamonds, antique and estate jewelry, firearms, coins, and paper currency. Beyond basic pawn transactions, they provide specialized jewelry services including expert repair, custom fabrication, restoration work, watch battery replacement, and professional insurance appraisals performed by an on-site jeweler.

Olde City Jewelry & Pawn distinguishes itself through the depth of expertise provided by their knowledgeable team and the breadth of their physical inventory in a large showroom setting. Their emphasis on fair value assessment, combined with on-site jewelry expertise and appraisal services, positions them as more than a basic pawn operation. The family-operated structure and 35+ years of industry background suggest consistent business practices and community reputation.

For consumers considering pawn transactions, this business represents a traditional pawn shop model where collateral-based loans and merchandise sales are primary offerings. The main limitation is that pawn loans are short-term solutions with interest costs, not alternatives to traditional credit. Additionally, like all pawn transactions, the amount offered will be significantly below retail or resale value of items pledged.
pros: On-site professional jeweler available for expert appraisals and repair work
Large 5,000-square-foot showroom with extensive inventory of fine jewelry, diamonds, and collectibles
35+ years of combined industry experience with family-operated business continuity
Specialized services beyond basic pawning: custom fabrication, restoration, and watch repair
Serves multiple communities across Northeast Florida (Bunnell, Elkton, Hastings, Nocatee, Palm Coast)
Accepts diverse collateral including jewelry, firearms, coins, and currency
Established since 2008 with local reputation in St. Augustine market
cons: Pawn loans carry interest costs and short repayment terms, making them expensive short-term borrowing
Items pledged are typically valued at 40-60% of retail value, resulting in significant loss of value
Limited to collateral-based lending only; cannot serve consumers without qualifying assets to pledge
No information provided about APR rates, loan terms, or fee structure on their website
Pawn transactions require physical item surrender, creating inconvenience for everyday access to pledged possessions
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash against jewelry, collectibles, or firearms with short repayment timelines
Buyers seeking discounted fine jewelry, diamonds, antique pieces, or collectible coins from a physical showroom
Jewelry owners requiring professional appraisals, repair services, or custom fabrication from qualified jewelers
Individuals in the Northeast Florida region seeking a trusted local pawn business with established community presence
diagnosis: Olde City Jewelry & Pawn is best suited for consumers who own jewelry, collectibles, or firearms and need immediate cash against those items, or buyers seeking discounted precious metals and jewelry from a physical showroom with professional expertise. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term borrowing solutions—items are typically valued at 40-60% below retail, and interest costs apply—making them unsuitable for consumers seeking affordable credit or long-term financing.
services: Pawn loans against jewelry, firearms, coins, and collectibles
Buy, sell, and trade transactions for fine jewelry and precious items
